## Checklist
- [ ] Interfaces match published contracts
- [ ] No forbidden dependencies introduced (verified by ESLint)
- [ ] Performance budget respected
- [ ] Error handling follows Result pattern — no throws across package boundaries
- [ ] All logging via @noah/logger — no console.*
- [ ] Tests cover the new behaviour
- [ ] Spec reference provided for all behavioral decisions
- [ ] No TODOs or placeholder implementations
